patch.value: brief: blocked_by edges doubled in blockers/risks (dependencies + blocked_by both parsed)

extractRelationships parsed a blocked_by edge from BOTH item.dependencies (a blocked_by-kind object) AND item.blocked_by (the denormalized string pm's 'update --blocked-by' writes), emitting the same (from,to,blocked_by) edge twice. Doubled edges inflated blockers[], risks counts, and recommendedPmUpdates. Fix: dedup extractRelationships output by (from,to,kind); no-op for singly-sourced depends_on edges. Regression test added.
brief blockers shows each blocked_by edge once; depends_on edges preserved; unit test covers the denormalized dup case; default output otherwise unchanged.

value.author: claude-opus
value.text: Fixed: extractRelationships now dedups by (from,to,kind). Verified: brief blockers shows single blocked_by edge (was doubled on 2026.7.12); 45/45 unit tests incl. new dedup regression test.
